title: Delights from the Garden Skirt
description:
Romantic and feminine, this vintage 90s black bias hem maxi skirt features a mixed floral print of rose pinks and soft mint and sage greens against an ink black backdrop. Slips on for wear.

  • Era: 1990s
  • Fabric: Rayon
  • Measurements: 35" length / 13"-16" across waist
  • Sizing: Best fits small/medium
  • Condition: Excellent vintage condition / Very light stress on a couple seams, not very visible unless up close due to the pattern

title: Shops on Bibury Skirt

  • 100% Rayon
  • Lined
  • Imported
